cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7590193227236396057","book_info":{"abstract":"【养成boss+诱骗女主黑化+病娇修罗+控制欲强】

　　穿越哈利波特世界。

　　凯撒觉醒“反派人生模拟器”。

　　模拟即可变强，更能将模拟中的恋爱记忆，植入对应女角色脑海！

　　向来腹黑的凯撒打算借用模拟人生走一条诱骗女角色们叛变黑化的地下路线。

　　赫敏、卢娜、芙蓉德拉库尔……

　　一个个善良正直的女主在他编织的回忆里黑化病娇，欲生欲死，无法摆脱。

　　可渐渐，他发现事情没有那么简单……

n_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":7368,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":19489},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7601557436289712921","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"第二个卢娜感觉写的一般，希望作者能把握好，特别是主角的战力，主角经历了多世模拟，对于魔法的钻研不可能比主角培养出来的反派魔女差，特别是主角的天赋词条这么多，而且主角在现实比她们先一步觉醒模拟里的记忆，所以再咋写主角在现实中的战力也是稳稳碾压反派魔女的。
          第二个模拟主角对于卢娜有些憋屈，我能接受，但是在现实世界中主角的实力一定要碾压众人，不然这本就是纯纯主角培养对手的吃瘪文了。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1769877621,"group_id":"7590193227236396057","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1436420304274803"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7590193227236396057","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"155"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读6小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":13041,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":23283,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7601034491804713753","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"无敌[赞]赫敏的感情线写得太好了，不是单纯的辞藻堆积，而是一种深层次的情感迸发。我的评价是无敌[赞]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1769753873,"group_id":"7590193227236396057","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"不是只打两三星，而是好的小说懒得打书评（除非特别好）","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1Ac7vJmwcJH9jhzlcFGr2rOdffmMx0TTtWeuJ+2l9SM","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/52388700369547aeb3896a57eba169ed~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776707841&x-signature=G08%2BsfI7ppXNU4n7SHJk8j7GVOM%3D","user_id":"1436420304274803","user_name":"鉴狮大师"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1436420304274803","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7590193227236396057","book_info":{"abstract":"【养成boss+诱骗女主黑化+病娇修罗+控制欲强】
